title: artemisia cretacea
intro: Artemisia cretacea, also known as Crete wormwood or Greek wormwood, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the island of Crete in Greece. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Artemisia cretacea include the treatment of digestive problems, fever reduction, and relief from skin infections and parasites. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
